# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-service
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  - api2.thirdparty.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-db.example.com
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  - number: 3306
    name: mysql
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.thirdparty.com
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: api.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-db-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-db.example.com
  tcp:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: external-db.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
    timeout: 60s
---
